changeSet.author: P70628
P70628
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role (id, name, code, type) VALUES (nextval('au_role_seq'), 'Administrator', 'regulator_administrator', 'REGULATOR'); INSERT INTO public.au_role (id, name, code, type) VALUES (nextval('au_role_seq'), 'Technical Consultant', 'regulator_technical_consultant', 'REGULATOR');

changeSet.author: P70628
P70311
changeSet.sql: UPDATE public.au_role set name = 'Administrator User' WHERE code = 'regulator_administrator'; UPDATE public.au_role set (name, code) = ('Basic User', 'regulator_basic_user') WHERE code = 'regulator_technical_consultant';

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) VALUES (nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), (select id from au_role where code='regulator_administrator'), 'PERM_SECTOR_ASSOCIATION_EDIT');

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role (id, name, code, type) VALUES (nextval('au_role_seq'), 'Sector Administrator User', 'sector_user_administrator', 'SECTOR_USER'); INSERT INTO public.au_role (id, name, code, type) VALUES (nextval('au_role_seq'), 'Sector Basic User', 'sector_user_basic_user', 'SECTOR_USER');

changeSet.author: P70311
P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) VALUES (nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), (select id from au_role where code='sector_user_basic_user'), 'PERM_TASK_ASSIGNMENT'); INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) VALUES (nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), (select id from au_role where code='sector_user_basic_user'), 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT');

changeSet.author: P63979
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) VALUES (nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), (select id from au_role where code='regulator_administrator'), 'PERM_SECTOR_USERS_EDIT');

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.sql: UPDATE public.au_role set name = 'Administrator User' WHERE code = 'sector_user_administrator' AND type = 'SECTOR_USER'; UPDATE public.au_role set name = 'Basic User' WHERE code = 'sector_user_basic_user' AND type = 'SECTOR_USER';

changeSet.author: P63979
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) VALUES (nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), (select id from au_role where code='regulator_administrator'), 'PERM_OPERATOR_USERS_EDIT');

changeSet.author: P63979
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM au_role_permission WHERE role_id IN (SELECT id FROM au_role WHERE type = 'OPERATOR');

changeSet.author: P63979
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM au_role WHERE type = 'OPERATOR' AND code != 'operator';

changeSet.author: P63979
changeSet.sql: UPDATE au_role SET code = 'operator_basic_user' WHERE type = 'OPERATOR' AND code = 'operator';

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) VALUES (nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), (select id from au_role where code='operator_basic_user'), 'PERM_USER_READONLY');

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_SUBMISSION' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_SUBMISSION' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: bountasp@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_VARIATION_TO_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_REVIEW' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_VARIATION_TO_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_REVIEW' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SUBMIT' from au_role where code in ('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user');

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where role_id in (select id from au_role where code in('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user')) and permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SUBMIT';

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, rp.permission from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code join au_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id where r.code in ('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user') and rp.permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SUBMIT';

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code where r.code in('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user')) and permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SUBMIT';

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_PERFORMANCE_REPORTING_DOWNLOAD_UPLOAD' from au_role where code in ('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user');

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, rp.permission from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code join au_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id where r.code in ('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user') and rp.permission = 'PERM_PERFORMANCE_REPORTING_DOWNLOAD_UPLOAD';

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where permission = 'PERM_PERFORMANCE_REPORTING_DOWNLOAD_UPLOAD' and authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code where r.code in('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P35066
changeSet.sql: insert into au_role_permission(id, role_id, permission) select nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD' from au_role where code in ('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user');

changeSet.author: P35066
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, rp.permission from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code join au_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id where r.code in ('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user') and rp.permission = 'PERM_PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD';

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where permission = 'PERM_PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD' and authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code where r.code in('sector_user_administrator', 'sector_user_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_PEER_REVIEW' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_PEER_REVIEW' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, rp.permission from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code join au_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id where r.code in ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user') and rp.permission = 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_PEER_REVIEW' and exists (select 1 from au_authority au2 join au_authority_permission aap on aap.authority_id = au2.id where au.id = au2.id and aap.permission = 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_SUBMISSION');

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where permission = 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_PEER_REVIEW' and authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code where r.code in('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, rp.permission from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code join au_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id where r.code in ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user') and rp.permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' and exists (select 1 from au_authority au2 join au_authority_permission aap on aap.authority_id = au2.id where au.id = au2.id and aap.permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW');

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' and authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au join au_role r on au.code = r.code where r.code in('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_PEER_REVIEW' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_PEER_REVIEW' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_PEER_REVIEW' from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null and exists (select 1 from au_authority au2 join au_authority_permission aap on aap.authority_id = au2.id where au.id = au2.id and aap.permission = 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_SUBMISSION') and not exists (select 1 from au_authority au2 join au_authority_permission aap on aap.authority_id = au2.id where au.id = au2.id and aap.permission = 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_PEER_REVIEW');

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where permission = 'PERM_ADMIN_TERMINATION_PEER_REVIEW' and authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null);

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null and exists (select 1 from au_authority au2 join au_authority_permission aap on aap.authority_id = au2.id where au.id = au2.id and aap.permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW') and not exists (select 1 from au_authority au2 join au_authority_permission aap on aap.authority_id = au2.id where au.id = au2.id and aap.permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW');

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' and authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null);

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_PEER_REVIEW' from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null and exists (select 1 from au_authority au2 join au_authority_permission aap on aap.authority_id = au2.id where au.id = au2.id and aap.permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REVIEW');

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_PEER_REVIEW' and authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null);

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_SUBMISSION' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_SUBMISSION' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_SUBMISSION' from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null;

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where permission = 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_SUBMISSION' and authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null);

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), r.id, 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_EDIT' FROM au_role r WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');

rollback.sql: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_EDIT' and role_id in (select r.id from au_role r where r.code in ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission (id, authority_id, "permission") select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), aa.id, 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_EDIT' from au_authority aa where aa.code in ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM au_authority_permission WHERE permission = 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_EDIT' AND authority_id in (select aa.id from au_authority aa where aa.code in ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission (id, authority_id, "permission") select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), aa.id, 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_EDIT' from au_authority aa where aa.competent_authority is not null and aa.code is null;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM au_authority_permission WHERE permission = 'PERM_FACILITY_AUDIT_EDIT' AND authority_id in (select aa.id from au_authority aa where aa.competent_authority is not null);

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SUBMIT' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SUBMIT' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission (id, authority_id, "permission") select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), aa.id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SUBMIT' from au_authority aa where aa.competent_authority is not null;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM au_authority_permission WHERE permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SUBMIT' AND authority_id in (select aa.id from au_authority aa where aa.competent_authority is not null);

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_PEER_REVIEW' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_PEER_REVIEW' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission (id, authority_id, "permission") select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), aa.id, 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_PEER_REVIEW' from au_authority aa where aa.competent_authority is not null;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM au_authority_permission WHERE permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_PEER_REVIEW' AND authority_id in (select aa.id from au_authority aa where aa.competent_authority is not null);

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_role_permission (id, role_id, permission) SELECT nextval('au_role_permission_seq'), id, 'PERM_NON_COMPLIANCE_SUBMISSION' FROM au_role WHERE code IN ('regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user');
changeSet.rollback: delete from au_role_permission where permission = 'PERM_NON_COMPLIANCE_SUBMISSION' and role_id in ( select id from au_role where code in ( 'regulator_administrator', 'regulator_basic_user'));

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_authority_permission(id, authority_id, permission) select nextval('au_authority_permission_seq'), au.id, 'PERM_NON_COMPLIANCE_SUBMISSION' from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null;

rollback.sql: delete from au_authority_permission where permission = 'PERM_NON_COMPLIANCE_SUBMISSION' and authority_id in (select au.id from au_authority au where au.competent_authority is not null);
